name: historymap
description: Static site generator for a company-style product history timeline (zigzag layout), deployable to GitHub Pages and embeddable via iframe.

scripts.deploy:cf: npm run build && rm -rf dist-worker && mkdir -p dist-worker/products/historymap && cp dist/index.html dist-worker/index.html && cp dist/index.html dist-worker/products/historymap/index.html && wrangler deploy
